scripts.dev: concurrently -n "gateway,auth,user,chat,message,socket" -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red" "cd api-gateway && npm run dev" "cd auth-service && npm run dev" "cd user-service && npm run dev" "cd chat-service && npm run dev" "cd message-service && npm run dev" "cd socket-service && npm run dev"
